upstream.name: lsdefine/GenericAgent
upstream.release_context: remote-main extension tree unchanged since prior review; browser67 preserved-feature drift revalidated

decision.reason: Latest upstream 733615d889d4fe33d557cc6340c8ddfa364123ef was checked with upstream:audit:latest. Extension drift changed_files=background.js,browser67/managed-content.js,browser67/runtime.js,content.js,disable_dialogs.js,manifest.json; upstream background.js is still missing local enhanced bridge features (batch_uses_handle_tabs,cdp_tabid_validation,cookies_tabid_validation,handle_tabs_dispatch,include_unscriptable,numeric_tab_id_validation,tabs_close,tabs_get,unsupported_tabs_method,ws_exec_tabid_validation), so direct sync remains disabled and the local bridge stays authoritative.

absorbed_reference.notes: GenericAgent macljqCtrl/AX and ljqCtrl DPI/click-check ideas are retained as audited reference and diagnostics, not default execution providers.
